profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Control how your account appears in the sidebar and other board surfaces.
profile.displayNameHint: Shown in the sidebar account footer and comment author surfaces.
profile.emailHint: Email is managed by your auth session and is read-only here.
profile.uploadHint: Stored in Paperclip file storage for {{company}}.
profile.uploadHintNoCompany: Select a company to upload an avatar into Paperclip storage.
profile.clickToUpload: Click the avatar to upload a new image.

company.title: Company Settings
company.name: Company name
company.requireBoardApproval: Require board approval for new hires

access.title: Access
access.canCreateAgents: Can create agents, invite users, assign tasks, and approve join requests

workspace.localNonGitDesc: A local folder without git semantics
workspace.remoteGitDesc: A repo URL with optional refs and local checkout
workspace.externalRef: A hosted workspace tracked by external reference
workspace.name: Name

plugins.title: Plugin Manager
plugins.installPluginDesc: Enter the npm package name of the plugin you wish to install.
plugins.uninstallConfirm: Are you sure you want to uninstall {{name}}? This will remove the plugin and all its data.
plugins.noPluginsDesc: Install a plugin to extend functionality.
plugins.noBundledExamples: No bundled example plugins were found in this checkout.
plugins.alphaWarningDesc: The plugin runtime and API surface are still changing. Expect breaking changes while this feature settles.
plugins.errorNoMessage: Plugin entered an error state without a stored error message.

experimental.title: Experimental
experimental.description: Opt into features that are still being evaluated before they become default behavior.
experimental.enableEnvironmentsDesc: Show environment management in company settings and allow project and agent environment assignment controls.
experimental.enableIsolatedWorkspacesDesc: Show execution workspace controls in project configuration and allow isolated workspace behavior for new and existing issue runs.
experimental.autoRestartDevServerDesc: In `pnpm dev:once`, wait for all queued and running local agent runs to finish, then restart the server automatically when backend changes or migrations make the current boot stale.
experimental.autoCreateRecoveryTasksDesc: Let the heartbeat scheduler create recovery issues for issue dependency chains that have been stalled for at least 24 hours.

general.title: General
general.description: Configure instance-wide preferences including log display, keyboard shortcuts, backup retention, and data sharing.
general.localTrustedDesc: Local trusted mode is optimized for a local operator. Browser requests run as local board context and no sign-in is required.
general.authenticatedPublicDesc: Authenticated public mode requires sign-in for board access and is intended for public URLs.
general.authenticatedPrivateDesc: Authenticated private mode requires sign-in and is intended for LAN, VPN, or other private-network deployments.
general.censorUsernameDesc: Hide the username segment in home-directory paths and similar operator-visible log output. Standalone username mentions outside of paths are not yet masked in the live transcript view. This is off by default.
general.keyboardShortcutsDesc: Enable app keyboard shortcuts, including inbox navigation and global shortcuts like creating issues or toggling panels. This is off by default.
general.backupRetentionDesc: Configure how long automatic database backups are retained. Backups run roughly every hour and are compressed with gzip. Within the daily window all backups are kept; beyond that, one backup per week and one per month are preserved.
general.aiFeedbackDesc: Control whether thumbs up and thumbs down votes can send the voted AI output to Paperclip Labs. Votes are always saved locally.
general.noDefaultFeedback: No default is saved yet. The next thumbs up or thumbs down choice will ask once and then save the answer here.
general.dontAllowDesc: Keep voted AI outputs local only.
general.signOutDesc: Sign out of this Paperclip instance. You will be redirected to the login page.
